summary: Iteration-14 P2 final retest — ALL STEPS PASS end-to-end. The Supabase enum patch (ALTER TYPE attempt_status ADD VALUE 'waiting') is now live and the redeem_test_code RPC succeeds. Two-context Playwright run (Context A = proctor super@hpa.test, Context B = student 300432) executed steps 1–9 without any blocker. Step 10 smoke skipped (chain worked).
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: count-submitted=0 after ending the session even though the toast says 'In-progress attempts auto-submitted.' This is technically correct in this run (Nathaniel was paused, not in_progress, so nothing was auto-submitted) but the copy could be slightly misleading when zero attempts are actually flipped to submitted. Consider conditional toast text, e.g., 'Test ended. No in-progress attempts to auto-submit.' when count_submitted_delta == 0.

StudentWaitingRoom render timing: immediately after wait_for_url('**/student/waiting/**'), the [data-testid=waiting-room] element was not yet queryable (query returned None) — the route changes before the component mounts its testid wrapper. Not a bug, but adding a stable wrapper that mounts synchronously with the route would make tests more deterministic.

rca_of_the_issue: RCA — iteration_14: The blocker reported in iteration_13 (Supabase enum attempt_status missing the 'waiting' value, causing redeem_test_code to 400 with `invalid input value for enum attempt_status: "waiting"`) is fully resolved. User confirmed via Supabase screenshot that `ALTER TYPE attempt_status ADD VALUE IF NOT EXISTS 'waiting';` ran with 'Success. No rows returned'. With the enum now containing all four labels (in_progress, submitted, reset, waiting) and the function body already containing 'waiting'::attempt_status casts (deployed in iteration_13), the entire P2 chain works: student → /student/waiting → proctor sees joined → start → /student/test → pause → end → auto-submit. No PostgREST schema cache reload was needed (the 4-value enum was visible to PostgREST immediately on the next RPC call).
